'''YM-2800 limpet ship''' was a survey and mining vessel used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] to deploy troopers into [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] starships.

==Characteristics==
[[File:YM-2800_Imperial-class_II_frigate.jpg|thumb|left|200px|A YM-2800 landing on an [[Imperial II-class frigate|''Imperial II''-class frigate]]]]
Though possessing heavy [[Particle shield/Legends|particle shielding]], YM-2800 were not equipped with [[Ray shield/Legends|ray shields]].<ref name="RECG" />

==History==
As a mining vessel, the limpet was designed to attach itself to the surface of a planet or an asteroid, then use plasma beam cutters to cut through the rocky surface to valuable materials below. However, the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] came up with the idea of using these ships to breach and board enemy space vessels. Usually it was freighters and storehouses that were assaulted, but occasionally military vessels were attacked as well.<ref name="RECG" />

They were first used during the [[Raid on an Imperial cargo convoy|battle of Per Lupelo]]. [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] later took one of these ships to rescue his friend, [[Janek Sunber/Legends|Janek Sunber]], from the Empire.

They were also used to deploy [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Alliance Special Forces]] SpaceOps into enemy ships.
